case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DAWNNA FRANCIS

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCIS, DAWNNA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-13-2007 - MATTER SETTLED AS TO DEFENDANT SYLVESTER POLLARD WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED THAT DEFENDANT DAWNNA FRANCIS WAS PREVIOUSLY DEFAULTED. JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI, CLERK: D. LOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCIS, DAWNNA POLLARD, SYLVESTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 606 ALEMANY BLVD., SF, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT" (AS TO DEFT SYLVESTER POLLARD BY STIP; AS TO DEFT DAWNNA FRANCIS BY DEFAULT)

MINI MINUTES: JPT Norman Nayfach, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority represented by Kim Reeder.
Attorneys Arnold W. Evje and Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Dawnna Francis is present.
Limited Scope Attorney Ted Janowsky appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for a Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Judge Pro Tem, counsel and litigants confer privately for settlement discussions.

No settlement reached, trial date remains set.
